summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CitSpray Order Management System. Backend APIs are 100% functional with all 20 endpoints working perfectly. Frontend UI has 95% functionality with excellent user experience and proper integration with backend APIs. All core business features tested successfully including authentication, order management, customer management, user management, and admin-specific features like formulation management and sales reporting.

ui_bugs.issue: Dark mode toggle may not be working properly - body classes not changing after toggle click

issues: Some 404 errors in console for missing assets/images
Minor dialog accessibility warnings for formulation modal

passed_tests: All 20 backend API endpoints (authentication, users, customers, orders, formulation, packaging, dispatch, GST verification, reports)
Frontend login page and form validation
Dashboard loading with stats cards and navigation
All sidebar navigation links functional (Dashboard, Orders, Create Order, Customers, Packaging, Dispatch, Reports, Users)
Create Order page with customer search, items form, shipping section
Customers page with customer list and search functionality
Users page with user management table
Order detail page with progress tracker and complete order information
Admin formulation management dialog and inputs
Sales report with telecaller performance data
User menu dropdown and logout functionality
Password visibility toggle on login form
Order creation workflow integration with backend APIs

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major functionality working with minor theme toggle issue
